steps.title: Attach however to Kittredge
steps.content: The contrast word however qualifies the claim that the book was not written solely by Kittredge. A semicolon then separates the second independent clause, which supports that claim by naming other contributors to the collection.

steps.title: Reject wrong contrast placement
steps.content: Choice B and Choice C make the second clause carry the contrast, even though Linda Hogan and Barry Lopez's contributions support the first clause. Choice D joins the independent clauses with only commas, creating a comma splice. The answer is A.
